{{nihongo|'''Ono Shrine'''|小野神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

== street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県大津市小野1961', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '滋賀県大津市小野', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:小野神社 (大津市)]] {{wikidata link|Q11464225}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 小野神社 |画像 = [[Image:Otsu-onojinja.JPG|270px]]
社殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|大津市|Q202907}}小野1961 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|天足彦国押人命|Q11443593}}
{{jalink|米餅搗大使主|Q11604425|米餅搗大使主命}} |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964|名神大}}）
旧{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}} |創建 = 創祀年代不詳 |本殿 = {{jalink|神明造|Q930545}} |別名 = |札所 = |例祭 = {{jalink|11月2日|Q2996}} |神事 = シトギ祭 |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=小野神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=9|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''小野神社'''（おのじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|大津市|Q202907}}小野にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|式内社}}。旧社格は{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}。{{jalink|祭神|Q11591100}}は{{jalink|小野氏|Q11464141}}の祖である{{jalink|米餅搗大使主|Q11604425|米餅搗大使主命}}であり、日本の{{jalink|餅|Q470519}}作りの祖といわれていることから、例祭のシトギ祭には、全国の{{jalink|菓子|Q5159627}}業界からの参拝を受けている。神紋は三ッ目。 === 歴史 === この地は{{jalink|小野氏|Q11464141}}の本拠地である。当社の創祀年代は不詳であるが{{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}）に制定されている。{{jalink|1891年|Q7837}}（{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}24年）に{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}に列格された。 === 祭神 === * 主祭神 - {{jalink|天足彦国押人命|Q11443593}}、{{jalink|米餅搗大使主|Q11604425|米餅搗大使主命}} === 境内 === [[Image:Onotakamurajinja.JPG|thumb|小野篁神社　本殿]] [[Image:Onotofujinja.JPG|thumb|小野道風神社　本殿]] * 本殿 * 中門 * 小野篁神社（{{jalink|重要文化財|Q1188622}}） - 祭神：{{jalink|小野篁|Q1139928}}。{{jalink|暦応|Q1146182}}3年（{{jalink|1340年|Q6056}}）建立。 * {{jalink|八幡神社}} * {{jalink|松尾神社|Q11529677}} * 社務所 * 境外社 **小野道風神社（重要文化財） - 祭神：{{jalink|小野道風|Q1439775}}。暦応4年（{{jalink|1341年|Q6062}}）建立。 ** 樹下神社 ** {{jalink|八坂神社|Q692714}} ** 岡宮神社 ** 小野妹子神社 - 祭神：{{jalink|小野妹子|Q1284072}}。妹子の墓とされる唐臼山古墳の墳丘上に建っている。 === 文化財 === === 重要文化財 === * 小野篁神社本殿 * 小野道風神社本殿 === 大津市指定有形文化財 === * 石造宝塔 1基 === 祭事 === * 11月2日　シトギ祭 === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=117 小野神社]（滋賀県神社庁） *[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/210201.html 小野神社二座]（國學院大學21世紀COEプログラム、神道・神社史料集成） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おのしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:大津市の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おのしんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:重要文化財 (建造物)]] [[Category:大津市の重要文化財]] [[Category:室町時代の建築]] [[Category:小野篁]] [[Category:小野妹子]] [[Category:小野道風]]

== street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県大津市小野1961', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '滋賀県大津市小野', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:小野神社 (大津市)]] {{wikidata link|Q11464225}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 小野神社 |画像 = [[Image:Otsu-onojinja.JPG|270px]]
社殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|大津市|Q202907}}小野1961 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|天足彦国押人命|Q11443593}}
{{jalink|米餅搗大使主|Q11604425|米餅搗大使主命}} |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964|名神大}}）
旧{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}} |創建 = 創祀年代不詳 |本殿 = {{jalink|神明造|Q930545}} |別名 = |札所 = |例祭 = {{jalink|11月2日|Q2996}} |神事 = シトギ祭 |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=小野神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=9|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''小野神社'''（おのじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|大津市|Q202907}}小野にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|式内社}}。旧社格は{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}。{{jalink|祭神|Q11591100}}は{{jalink|小野氏|Q11464141}}の祖である{{jalink|米餅搗大使主|Q11604425|米餅搗大使主命}}であり、日本の{{jalink|餅|Q470519}}作りの祖といわれていることから、例祭のシトギ祭には、全国の{{jalink|菓子|Q5159627}}業界からの参拝を受けている。神紋は三ッ目。 === 歴史 === この地は{{jalink|小野氏|Q11464141}}の本拠地である。当社の創祀年代は不詳であるが{{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}）に制定されている。{{jalink|1891年|Q7837}}（{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}24年）に{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}に列格された。 === 祭神 === * 主祭神 - {{jalink|天足彦国押人命|Q11443593}}、{{jalink|米餅搗大使主|Q11604425|米餅搗大使主命}} === 境内 === [[Image:Onotakamurajinja.JPG|thumb|小野篁神社　本殿]] [[Image:Onotofujinja.JPG|thumb|小野道風神社　本殿]] * 本殿 * 中門 * 小野篁神社（{{jalink|重要文化財|Q1188622}}） - 祭神：{{jalink|小野篁|Q1139928}}。{{jalink|暦応|Q1146182}}3年（{{jalink|1340年|Q6056}}）建立。 * {{jalink|八幡神社}} * {{jalink|松尾神社|Q11529677}} * 社務所 * 境外社 **小野道風神社（重要文化財） - 祭神：{{jalink|小野道風|Q1439775}}。暦応4年（{{jalink|1341年|Q6062}}）建立。 ** 樹下神社 ** {{jalink|八坂神社|Q692714}} ** 岡宮神社 ** 小野妹子神社 - 祭神：{{jalink|小野妹子|Q1284072}}。妹子の墓とされる唐臼山古墳の墳丘上に建っている。 === 文化財 === === 重要文化財 === * 小野篁神社本殿 * 小野道風神社本殿 === 大津市指定有形文化財 === * 石造宝塔 1基 === 祭事 === * 11月2日　シトギ祭 === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=117 小野神社]（滋賀県神社庁） *[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/210201.html 小野神社二座]（國學院大學21世紀COEプログラム、神道・神社史料集成） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おのしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:大津市の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おのしんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:重要文化財 (建造物)]] [[Category:大津市の重要文化財]] [[Category:室町時代の建築]] [[Category:小野篁]] [[Category:小野妹子]] [[Category:小野道風]] [[Category:pages]]

== street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県大津市小野1961', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '滋賀県大津市小野', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:小野神社 (大津市)]] {{wikidata link|Q11464225}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 小野神社 |画像 = [[Image:Otsu-onojinja.JPG|270px]]
社殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|大津市|Q202907}}小野1961 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|天足彦国押人命|Q11443593}}
{{jalink|米餅搗大使主|Q11604425|米餅搗大使主命}} |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964|名神大}}）
旧{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}} |創建 = 創祀年代不詳 |本殿 = {{jalink|神明造|Q930545}} |別名 = |札所 = |例祭 = {{jalink|11月2日|Q2996}} |神事 = シトギ祭 |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=小野神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=9|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''小野神社'''（おのじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|大津市|Q202907}}小野にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|式内社}}。旧社格は{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}。{{jalink|祭神|Q11591100}}は{{jalink|小野氏|Q11464141}}の祖である{{jalink|米餅搗大使主|Q11604425|米餅搗大使主命}}であり、日本の{{jalink|餅|Q470519}}作りの祖といわれていることから、例祭のシトギ祭には、全国の{{jalink|菓子|Q5159627}}業界からの参拝を受けている。神紋は三ッ目。 === 歴史 === この地は{{jalink|小野氏|Q11464141}}の本拠地である。当社の創祀年代は不詳であるが{{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}）に制定されている。{{jalink|1891年|Q7837}}（{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}24年）に{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}に列格された。 === 祭神 === * 主祭神 - {{jalink|天足彦国押人命|Q11443593}}、{{jalink|米餅搗大使主|Q11604425|米餅搗大使主命}} === 境内 === [[Image:Onotakamurajinja.JPG|thumb|小野篁神社　本殿]] [[Image:Onotofujinja.JPG|thumb|小野道風神社　本殿]] * 本殿 * 中門 * 小野篁神社（{{jalink|重要文化財|Q1188622}}） - 祭神：{{jalink|小野篁|Q1139928}}。{{jalink|暦応|Q1146182}}3年（{{jalink|1340年|Q6056}}）建立。 * {{jalink|八幡神社}} * {{jalink|松尾神社|Q11529677}} * 社務所 * 境外社 **小野道風神社（重要文化財） - 祭神：{{jalink|小野道風|Q1439775}}。暦応4年（{{jalink|1341年|Q6062}}）建立。 ** 樹下神社 ** {{jalink|八坂神社|Q692714}} ** 岡宮神社 ** 小野妹子神社 - 祭神：{{jalink|小野妹子|Q1284072}}。妹子の墓とされる唐臼山古墳の墳丘上に建っている。 === 文化財 === === 重要文化財 === * 小野篁神社本殿 * 小野道風神社本殿 === 大津市指定有形文化財 === * 石造宝塔 1基 === 祭事 === * 11月2日　シトギ祭 === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=117 小野神社]（滋賀県神社庁） *[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/210201.html 小野神社二座]（國學院大學21世紀COEプログラム、神道・神社史料集成） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おのしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:大津市の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おのしんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:重要文化財 (建造物)]] [[Category:大津市の重要文化財]] [[Category:室町時代の建築]] [[Category:小野篁]] [[Category:小野妹子]] [[Category:小野道風]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

== street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県大津市小野1961', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '滋賀県大津市小野', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:小野神社 (大津市)]] {{wikidata link|Q11464225}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 小野神社 |画像 = [[Image:Otsu-onojinja.JPG|270px]]
社殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|大津市|Q202907}}小野1961 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|天足彦国押人命|Q11443593}}
{{jalink|米餅搗大使主|Q11604425|米餅搗大使主命}} |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964|名神大}}）
旧{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}} |創建 = 創祀年代不詳 |本殿 = {{jalink|神明造|Q930545}} |別名 = |札所 = |例祭 = {{jalink|11月2日|Q2996}} |神事 = シトギ祭 |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=小野神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=9|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''小野神社'''（おのじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|大津市|Q202907}}小野にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|式内社}}。旧社格は{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}。{{jalink|祭神|Q11591100}}は{{jalink|小野氏|Q11464141}}の祖である{{jalink|米餅搗大使主|Q11604425|米餅搗大使主命}}であり、日本の{{jalink|餅|Q470519}}作りの祖といわれていることから、例祭のシトギ祭には、全国の{{jalink|菓子|Q5159627}}業界からの参拝を受けている。神紋は三ッ目。 === 歴史 === この地は{{jalink|小野氏|Q11464141}}の本拠地である。当社の創祀年代は不詳であるが{{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}）に制定されている。{{jalink|1891年|Q7837}}（{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}24年）に{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}に列格された。 === 祭神 === * 主祭神 - {{jalink|天足彦国押人命|Q11443593}}、{{jalink|米餅搗大使主|Q11604425|米餅搗大使主命}} === 境内 === [[Image:Onotakamurajinja.JPG|thumb|小野篁神社　本殿]] [[Image:Onotofujinja.JPG|thumb|小野道風神社　本殿]] * 本殿 * 中門 * 小野篁神社（{{jalink|重要文化財|Q1188622}}） - 祭神：{{jalink|小野篁|Q1139928}}。{{jalink|暦応|Q1146182}}3年（{{jalink|1340年|Q6056}}）建立。 * {{jalink|八幡神社}} * {{jalink|松尾神社|Q11529677}} * 社務所 * 境外社 **小野道風神社（重要文化財） - 祭神：{{jalink|小野道風|Q1439775}}。暦応4年（{{jalink|1341年|Q6062}}）建立。 ** 樹下神社 ** {{jalink|八坂神社|Q692714}} ** 岡宮神社 ** 小野妹子神社 - 祭神：{{jalink|小野妹子|Q1284072}}。妹子の墓とされる唐臼山古墳の墳丘上に建っている。 === 文化財 === === 重要文化財 === * 小野篁神社本殿 * 小野道風神社本殿 === 大津市指定有形文化財 === * 石造宝塔 1基 === 祭事 === * 11月2日　シトギ祭 === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=117 小野神社]（滋賀県神社庁） *[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/210201.html 小野神社二座]（國學院大學21世紀COEプログラム、神道・神社史料集成） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おのしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:大津市の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おのしんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:重要文化財 (建造物)]] [[Category:大津市の重要文化財]] [[Category:室町時代の建築]] [[Category:小野篁]] [[Category:小野妹子]] [[Category:小野道風]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

== street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県大津市小野1961', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '滋賀県大津市小野', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:小野神社 (大津市)]] {{wikidata link|Q11464225}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 小野神社 |画像 = [[Image:Otsu-onojinja.JPG|270px]]
社殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|大津市|Q202907}}小野1961 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|天足彦国押人命|Q11443593}}
{{jalink|米餅搗大使主|Q11604425|米餅搗大使主命}} |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964|名神大}}）
旧{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}} |創建 = 創祀年代不詳 |本殿 = {{jalink|神明造|Q930545}} |別名 = |札所 = |例祭 = {{jalink|11月2日|Q2996}} |神事 = シトギ祭 |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=小野神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=9|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''小野神社'''（おのじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|大津市|Q202907}}小野にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|式内社}}。旧社格は{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}。{{jalink|祭神|Q11591100}}は{{jalink|小野氏|Q11464141}}の祖である{{jalink|米餅搗大使主|Q11604425|米餅搗大使主命}}であり、日本の{{jalink|餅|Q470519}}作りの祖といわれていることから、例祭のシトギ祭には、全国の{{jalink|菓子|Q5159627}}業界からの参拝を受けている。神紋は三ッ目。 === 歴史 === この地は{{jalink|小野氏|Q11464141}}の本拠地である。当社の創祀年代は不詳であるが{{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}）に制定されている。{{jalink|1891年|Q7837}}（{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}24年）に{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}に列格された。 === 祭神 === * 主祭神 - {{jalink|天足彦国押人命|Q11443593}}、{{jalink|米餅搗大使主|Q11604425|米餅搗大使主命}} === 境内 === [[Image:Onotakamurajinja.JPG|thumb|小野篁神社　本殿]] [[Image:Onotofujinja.JPG|thumb|小野道風神社　本殿]] * 本殿 * 中門 * 小野篁神社（{{jalink|重要文化財|Q1188622}}） - 祭神：{{jalink|小野篁|Q1139928}}。{{jalink|暦応|Q1146182}}3年（{{jalink|1340年|Q6056}}）建立。 * {{jalink|八幡神社}} * {{jalink|松尾神社|Q11529677}} * 社務所 * 境外社 **小野道風神社（重要文化財） - 祭神：{{jalink|小野道風|Q1439775}}。暦応4年（{{jalink|1341年|Q6062}}）建立。 ** 樹下神社 ** {{jalink|八坂神社|Q692714}} ** 岡宮神社 ** 小野妹子神社 - 祭神：{{jalink|小野妹子|Q1284072}}。妹子の墓とされる唐臼山古墳の墳丘上に建っている。 === 文化財 === === 重要文化財 === * 小野篁神社本殿 * 小野道風神社本殿 === 大津市指定有形文化財 === * 石造宝塔 1基 === 祭事 === * 11月2日　シトギ祭 === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=117 小野神社]（滋賀県神社庁） *[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/210201.html 小野神社二座]（國學院大學21世紀COEプログラム、神道・神社史料集成） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おのしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:大津市の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おのしんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:重要文化財 (建造物)]] [[Category:大津市の重要文化財]] [[Category:室町時代の建築]] [[Category:小野篁]] [[Category:小野妹子]] [[Category:小野道風]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

== street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県大津市小野1961', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '滋賀県大津市小野', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:小野神社 (大津市)]] {{wikidata link|Q11464225}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 小野神社 |画像 = [[Image:Otsu-onojinja.JPG|270px]]
社殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|大津市|Q202907}}小野1961 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|天足彦国押人命|Q11443593}}
{{jalink|米餅搗大使主|Q11604425|米餅搗大使主命}} |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964|名神大}}）
旧{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}} |創建 = 創祀年代不詳 |本殿 = {{jalink|神明造|Q930545}} |別名 = |札所 = |例祭 = {{jalink|11月2日|Q2996}} |神事 = シトギ祭 |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=小野神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=9|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''小野神社'''（おのじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|大津市|Q202907}}小野にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|式内社}}。旧社格は{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}。{{jalink|祭神|Q11591100}}は{{jalink|小野氏|Q11464141}}の祖である{{jalink|米餅搗大使主|Q11604425|米餅搗大使主命}}であり、日本の{{jalink|餅|Q470519}}作りの祖といわれていることから、例祭のシトギ祭には、全国の{{jalink|菓子|Q5159627}}業界からの参拝を受けている。神紋は三ッ目。 === 歴史 === この地は{{jalink|小野氏|Q11464141}}の本拠地である。当社の創祀年代は不詳であるが{{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}）に制定されている。{{jalink|1891年|Q7837}}（{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}24年）に{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}に列格された。 === 祭神 === * 主祭神 - {{jalink|天足彦国押人命|Q11443593}}、{{jalink|米餅搗大使主|Q11604425|米餅搗大使主命}} === 境内 === [[Image:Onotakamurajinja.JPG|thumb|小野篁神社　本殿]] [[Image:Onotofujinja.JPG|thumb|小野道風神社　本殿]] * 本殿 * 中門 * 小野篁神社（{{jalink|重要文化財|Q1188622}}） - 祭神：{{jalink|小野篁|Q1139928}}。{{jalink|暦応|Q1146182}}3年（{{jalink|1340年|Q6056}}）建立。 * {{jalink|八幡神社}} * {{jalink|松尾神社|Q11529677}} * 社務所 * 境外社 **小野道風神社（重要文化財） - 祭神：{{jalink|小野道風|Q1439775}}。暦応4年（{{jalink|1341年|Q6062}}）建立。 ** 樹下神社 ** {{jalink|八坂神社|Q692714}} ** 岡宮神社 ** 小野妹子神社 - 祭神：{{jalink|小野妹子|Q1284072}}。妹子の墓とされる唐臼山古墳の墳丘上に建っている。 === 文化財 === === 重要文化財 === * 小野篁神社本殿 * 小野道風神社本殿 === 大津市指定有形文化財 === * 石造宝塔 1基 === 祭事 === * 11月2日　シトギ祭 === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=117 小野神社]（滋賀県神社庁） *[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/210201.html 小野神社二座]（國學院大學21世紀COEプログラム、神道・神社史料集成） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おのしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ono Shrine (Shiga)]][[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:大津市の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おのしんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:重要文化財 (建造物)]] [[Category:大津市の重要文化財]] [[Category:室町時代の建築]] [[Category:小野篁]] [[Category:小野妹子]] [[Category:小野道風]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

== street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県大津市小野1961', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '滋賀県大津市小野', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:小野神社 (大津市)]] {{wikidata link|Q11464225}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 小野神社 |画像 = [[Image:Otsu-onojinja.JPG|270px]]
社殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|大津市|Q202907}}小野1961 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|天足彦国押人命|Q11443593}}
{{jalink|米餅搗大使主|Q11604425|米餅搗大使主命}} |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964|名神大}}）
旧{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}} |創建 = 創祀年代不詳 |本殿 = {{jalink|神明造|Q930545}} |別名 = |札所 = |例祭 = {{jalink|11月2日|Q2996}} |神事 = シトギ祭 |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=小野神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=9|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''小野神社'''（おのじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|大津市|Q202907}}小野にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|式内社}}。旧社格は{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}。{{jalink|祭神|Q11591100}}は{{jalink|小野氏|Q11464141}}の祖である{{jalink|米餅搗大使主|Q11604425|米餅搗大使主命}}であり、日本の{{jalink|餅|Q470519}}作りの祖といわれていることから、例祭のシトギ祭には、全国の{{jalink|菓子|Q5159627}}業界からの参拝を受けている。神紋は三ッ目。 === 歴史 === この地は{{jalink|小野氏|Q11464141}}の本拠地である。当社の創祀年代は不詳であるが{{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}）に制定されている。{{jalink|1891年|Q7837}}（{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}24年）に{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}に列格された。 === 祭神 === * 主祭神 - {{jalink|天足彦国押人命|Q11443593}}、{{jalink|米餅搗大使主|Q11604425|米餅搗大使主命}} === 境内 === [[Image:Onotakamurajinja.JPG|thumb|小野篁神社　本殿]] [[Image:Onotofujinja.JPG|thumb|小野道風神社　本殿]] * 本殿 * 中門 * 小野篁神社（{{jalink|重要文化財|Q1188622}}） - 祭神：{{jalink|小野篁|Q1139928}}。{{jalink|暦応|Q1146182}}3年（{{jalink|1340年|Q6056}}）建立。 * {{jalink|八幡神社}} * {{jalink|松尾神社|Q11529677}} * 社務所 * 境外社 **小野道風神社（重要文化財） - 祭神：{{jalink|小野道風|Q1439775}}。暦応4年（{{jalink|1341年|Q6062}}）建立。 ** 樹下神社 ** {{jalink|八坂神社|Q692714}} ** 岡宮神社 ** 小野妹子神社 - 祭神：{{jalink|小野妹子|Q1284072}}。妹子の墓とされる唐臼山古墳の墳丘上に建っている。 === 文化財 === === 重要文化財 === * 小野篁神社本殿 * 小野道風神社本殿 === 大津市指定有形文化財 === * 石造宝塔 1基 === 祭事 === * 11月2日　シトギ祭 === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=117 小野神社]（滋賀県神社庁） *[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/210201.html 小野神社二座]（國學院大學21世紀COEプログラム、神道・神社史料集成） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おのしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ono Shrine (Shiga)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ono Shrine (Shiga)]][[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Ono Shrine (Shiga)]][[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:大津市の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おのしんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:重要文化財 (建造物)]] [[Category:大津市の重要文化財]] [[Category:室町時代の建築]] [[Category:小野篁]] [[Category:小野妹子]] [[Category:小野道風]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

1 revision imported: used local AI agents to translate these pages. Contrary to the description it was actually Claude Code for a few, OpenClaw with Codex, and regular Codex. Ollama and DeepSeek were too bad to actually use. see categorization since some of them are very questionable, especially if there was a massive decrease in page size or the {{jawiki| template is minimal or absent on the page

{{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県大津市小野1961', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '滋賀県大津市小野', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:小野神社 (大津市)]] {{wikidata link|Q11464225}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Ono Shrine |画像 = [[Image:Otsu-onojinja.JPG|270px]]
Shrine buildings |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ōtsu|Q202907|WD=Q202907|1=Ōtsu}}Ono 1961 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Ama-tarashihiko-kuni-oshi-hito-no-Mikoto|Q11443593|WD=Q11443593|1=Prince Ametarashihiko}}
{{ill|lt=Tachikara-mochi-tsuki no omi|Q11604425|WD=Q11604425|lt=Kome-mochi-tsuki-ōomi-no-Mikoto|1=Taganetsuki no Ōomi no Mikoto}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=major myōjin shrine|1=Myōjin Taisha}})
former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建 = Founding era unknown |本殿 = {{ill|lt=shinmei-zukuri|Q930545|WD=Q930545|1=Shinmei-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=November 2|Q2996|WD=Q2996|1=November 2}} |神事 = Shitogi Festival |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Ono Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=9|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Ono Shrine''' (おのじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Ono, {{ill|lt=Ōtsu|Q202907|WD=Q202907|1=Ōtsu}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}. Its former rank was {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. The {{ill|lt=enshrined deity|Q11591100|WD=Q11591100|1=Saijin}} is {{ill|lt=Kome-mochi-tsuki-ōomi|Q11604425|WD=Q11604425|lt=Kome-mochi-tsuki-ōomi-no-Mikoto|1=Taganetsuki no Ōomi no Mikoto}}, ancestor of the {{ill|lt=Ono clan|Q11464141|WD=Q11464141|1=Ono clan}}, and is said to be the ancestral deity of mochi making in Japan. For that reason, the annual Shitogi Festival receives worshipers from confectionery industries across Japan. The shrine crest is Mitsume. === History === This area is the base of the {{ill|lt=Ono clan|Q11464141|WD=Q11464141|1=Ono clan}}. The founding period is unknown, but it was designated a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}). In {{ill|lt=1891|Q7837|WD=Q7837|1=1891}} ({{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 24), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Enshrined deities === * Main deities - {{ill|lt=Ama-tarashihiko-kuni-oshi-hito-no-Mikoto|Q11443593|WD=Q11443593|1=Prince Ametarashihiko}}, {{ill|lt=Tachikara-mochi-tsuki no omi|Q11604425|WD=Q11604425|lt=Kome-mochi-tsuki-ōomi-no-Mikoto|1=Taganetsuki no Ōomi no Mikoto}} === Precinct === [[Image:Onotakamurajinja.JPG|thumb|Ono no Takamura Shrine, honden]] [[Image:Onotofujinja.JPG|thumb|Ono no Tōfū Shrine, honden]] * Honden * Chūmon gate * Ono no Takamura Shrine ({{ill|lt=Important Cultural Property|Q1188622|WD=Q1188622|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)}}) - Deity: {{ill|lt=Ono no Takamura|Q1139928|WD=Q1139928|1=Ono no Takamura}}. Built in year 3 of {{ill|lt=Ryakuō|Q1146182|WD=Q1146182|1=Ryakuō}} ({{ill|lt=1340|Q6056|WD=Q6056|1=1340}}). * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Hachiman Shrine|1=Hachiman shrine|WD=Q11390939}} * {{ill|lt=Matsuo Shrine|Q11529677|WD=Q11529677|1=Matsuo shrine}} * Shrine office * Outer precinct shrines ** Ono no Tōfū Shrine (Important Cultural Property) - Deity: {{ill|lt=Ono no Tōfū|Q1439775|WD=Q1439775|1=Ono no Michikaze}}. Built in Ryakuō 4 ({{ill|lt=1341|Q6062|WD=Q6062|1=1341}}). ** Juge Shrine ** {{ill|lt=Yasaka Shrine|Q692714|WD=Q692714|1=Yasaka Shrine}} ** Okamiya Shrine ** Ono no Imoko Shrine - Deity: {{ill|lt=Ono no Imoko|Q1284072|WD=Q1284072|1=Ono no Imoko}}. Built on the mound of Karasu-yama Kofun, said to be Imoko's grave. === Cultural properties === === Important Cultural Properties === * Honden of Ono no Takamura Shrine * Honden of Ono no Tōfū Shrine === Ōtsu City designated tangible cultural property === * One stone hōtō pagoda === Festivals === * November 2 - Shitogi Festival === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=117 Ono Shrine] (Shiga Prefectural Shrine Association) *[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/210201.html Ono Shrine Two Seats] (Kokugakuin University 21st Century COE Program, Shinto/Shrine Historical Materials Compilation) {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おのしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ono Shrine (Shiga)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ono Shrine (Shiga)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Ono Shrine (Shiga)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:大津市の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おのしんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:重要文化財 (建造物)]] [[Category:大津市の重要文化財]] [[Category:室町時代の建築]] [[Category:小野篁]] [[Category:小野妹子]] [[Category:小野道風]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

{{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県大津市小野1961', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '滋賀県大津市小野', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:小野神社 (大津市)]] {{wikidata link|Q11464225}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Ono Shrine |画像 = [[Image:Otsu-onojinja.JPG|270px]]
Shrine buildings |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ōtsu|Q202907|WD=Q202907|1=Ōtsu}}Ono 1961 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Ama-tarashihiko-kuni-oshi-hito-no-Mikoto|Q11443593|WD=Q11443593|1=Prince Ametarashihiko}}
{{ill|lt=Tachikara-mochi-tsuki no omi|Q11604425|WD=Q11604425|lt=Kome-mochi-tsuki-ōomi-no-Mikoto|1=Taganetsuki no Ōomi no Mikoto}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=major myōjin shrine|1=Myōjin Taisha}})
former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建 = Founding era unknown |本殿 = {{ill|lt=shinmei-zukuri|Q930545|WD=Q930545|1=Shinmei-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=November 2|Q2996|WD=Q2996|1=November 2}} |神事 = Shitogi Festival |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Ono Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=9|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Ono Shrine''' (おのじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Ono, {{ill|lt=Ōtsu|Q202907|WD=Q202907|1=Ōtsu}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}. Its former rank was {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. The {{ill|lt=enshrined deity|Q11591100|WD=Q11591100|1=Saijin}} is {{ill|lt=Kome-mochi-tsuki-ōomi|Q11604425|WD=Q11604425|lt=Kome-mochi-tsuki-ōomi-no-Mikoto|1=Taganetsuki no Ōomi no Mikoto}}, ancestor of the {{ill|lt=Ono clan|Q11464141|WD=Q11464141|1=Ono clan}}, and is said to be the ancestral deity of mochi making in Japan. For that reason, the annual Shitogi Festival receives worshipers from confectionery industries across Japan. The shrine crest is Mitsume. === History === This area is the base of the {{ill|lt=Ono clan|Q11464141|WD=Q11464141|1=Ono clan}}. The founding period is unknown, but it was designated a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}). In {{ill|lt=1891|Q7837|WD=Q7837|1=1891}} ({{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 24), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Enshrined deities === * Main deities - {{ill|lt=Ama-tarashihiko-kuni-oshi-hito-no-Mikoto|Q11443593|WD=Q11443593|1=Prince Ametarashihiko}}, {{ill|lt=Tachikara-mochi-tsuki no omi|Q11604425|WD=Q11604425|lt=Kome-mochi-tsuki-ōomi-no-Mikoto|1=Taganetsuki no Ōomi no Mikoto}} === Precinct === [[Image:Onotakamurajinja.JPG|thumb|Ono no Takamura Shrine, honden]] [[Image:Onotofujinja.JPG|thumb|Ono no Tōfū Shrine, honden]] * Honden * Chūmon gate * Ono no Takamura Shrine ({{ill|lt=Important Cultural Property|Q1188622|WD=Q1188622|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)}}) - Deity: {{ill|lt=Ono no Takamura|Q1139928|WD=Q1139928|1=Ono no Takamura}}. Built in year 3 of {{ill|lt=Ryakuō|Q1146182|WD=Q1146182|1=Ryakuō}} ({{ill|lt=1340|Q6056|WD=Q6056|1=1340}}). * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Hachiman Shrine|1=Hachiman shrine|WD=Q11390939}} * {{ill|lt=Matsuo Shrine|Q11529677|WD=Q11529677|1=Matsuo shrine}} * Shrine office * Outer precinct shrines ** Ono no Tōfū Shrine (Important Cultural Property) - Deity: {{ill|lt=Ono no Tōfū|Q1439775|WD=Q1439775|1=Ono no Michikaze}}. Built in Ryakuō 4 ({{ill|lt=1341|Q6062|WD=Q6062|1=1341}}). ** Juge Shrine ** {{ill|lt=Yasaka Shrine|Q692714|WD=Q692714|1=Yasaka Shrine}} ** Okamiya Shrine ** Ono no Imoko Shrine - Deity: {{ill|lt=Ono no Imoko|Q1284072|WD=Q1284072|1=Ono no Imoko}}. Built on the mound of Karasu-yama Kofun, said to be Imoko's grave. === Cultural properties === === Important Cultural Properties === * Honden of Ono no Takamura Shrine * Honden of Ono no Tōfū Shrine === Ōtsu City designated tangible cultural property === * One stone hōtō pagoda === Festivals === * November 2 - Shitogi Festival === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=117 Ono Shrine] (Shiga Prefectural Shrine Association) *[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/210201.html Ono Shrine Two Seats] (Kokugakuin University 21st Century COE Program, Shinto/Shrine Historical Materials Compilation) {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おのしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ono Shrine (Shiga)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ono Shrine (Shiga)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Ono Shrine (Shiga)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:大津市の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おのしんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:重要文化財 (建造物)]] [[Category:大津市の重要文化財]] [[Category:室町時代の建築]] [[Category:小野篁]] [[Category:小野妹子]] [[Category:小野道風]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

{{wikidata link|Q11464225}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Ono Shrine |画像 = [[Image:Otsu-onojinja.JPG|270px]]
Shrine buildings |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ōtsu|Q202907|WD=Q202907|1=Ōtsu}}Ono 1961 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Ama-tarashihiko-kuni-oshi-hito-no-Mikoto|Q11443593|WD=Q11443593|1=Prince Ametarashihiko}}
{{ill|lt=Tachikara-mochi-tsuki no omi|Q11604425|WD=Q11604425|lt=Kome-mochi-tsuki-ōomi-no-Mikoto|1=Taganetsuki no Ōomi no Mikoto}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=major myōjin shrine|1=Myōjin Taisha}})
former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建 = Founding era unknown |本殿 = {{ill|lt=shinmei-zukuri|Q930545|WD=Q930545|1=Shinmei-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=November 2|Q2996|WD=Q2996|1=November 2}} |神事 = Shitogi Festival |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Ono Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=9|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Ono Shrine''' (おのじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Ono, {{ill|lt=Ōtsu|Q202907|WD=Q202907|1=Ōtsu}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}. Its former rank was {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. The {{ill|lt=enshrined deity|Q11591100|WD=Q11591100|1=Saijin}} is {{ill|lt=Kome-mochi-tsuki-ōomi|Q11604425|WD=Q11604425|lt=Kome-mochi-tsuki-ōomi-no-Mikoto|1=Taganetsuki no Ōomi no Mikoto}}, ancestor of the {{ill|lt=Ono clan|Q11464141|WD=Q11464141|1=Ono clan}}, and is said to be the ancestral deity of mochi making in Japan. For that reason, the annual Shitogi Festival receives worshipers from confectionery industries across Japan. The shrine crest is Mitsume. === History === This area is the base of the {{ill|lt=Ono clan|Q11464141|WD=Q11464141|1=Ono clan}}. The founding period is unknown, but it was designated a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}). In {{ill|lt=1891|Q7837|WD=Q7837|1=1891}} ({{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 24), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Enshrined deities === * Main deities - {{ill|lt=Ama-tarashihiko-kuni-oshi-hito-no-Mikoto|Q11443593|WD=Q11443593|1=Prince Ametarashihiko}}, {{ill|lt=Tachikara-mochi-tsuki no omi|Q11604425|WD=Q11604425|lt=Kome-mochi-tsuki-ōomi-no-Mikoto|1=Taganetsuki no Ōomi no Mikoto}} === Precinct === [[Image:Onotakamurajinja.JPG|thumb|Ono no Takamura Shrine, honden]] [[Image:Onotofujinja.JPG|thumb|Ono no Tōfū Shrine, honden]] * Honden * Chūmon gate * Ono no Takamura Shrine ({{ill|lt=Important Cultural Property|Q1188622|WD=Q1188622|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)}}) - Deity: {{ill|lt=Ono no Takamura|Q1139928|WD=Q1139928|1=Ono no Takamura}}. Built in year 3 of {{ill|lt=Ryakuō|Q1146182|WD=Q1146182|1=Ryakuō}} ({{ill|lt=1340|Q6056|WD=Q6056|1=1340}}). * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Hachiman Shrine|1=Hachiman shrine|WD=Q11390939}} * {{ill|lt=Matsuo Shrine|Q11529677|WD=Q11529677|1=Matsuo shrine}} * Shrine office * Outer precinct shrines ** Ono no Tōfū Shrine (Important Cultural Property) - Deity: {{ill|lt=Ono no Tōfū|Q1439775|WD=Q1439775|1=Ono no Michikaze}}. Built in Ryakuō 4 ({{ill|lt=1341|Q6062|WD=Q6062|1=1341}}). ** Juge Shrine ** {{ill|lt=Yasaka Shrine|Q692714|WD=Q692714|1=Yasaka Shrine}} ** Okamiya Shrine ** Ono no Imoko Shrine - Deity: {{ill|lt=Ono no Imoko|Q1284072|WD=Q1284072|1=Ono no Imoko}}. Built on the mound of Karasu-yama Kofun, said to be Imoko's grave. === Cultural properties === === Important Cultural Properties === * Honden of Ono no Takamura Shrine * Honden of Ono no Tōfū Shrine === Ōtsu City designated tangible cultural property === * One stone hōtō pagoda === Festivals === * November 2 - Shitogi Festival === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=117 Ono Shrine] (Shiga Prefectural Shrine Association) *[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/210201.html Ono Shrine Two Seats] (Kokugakuin University 21st Century COE Program, Shinto/Shrine Historical Materials Compilation) {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おのしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ono Shrine (Shiga)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ono Shrine (Shiga)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Ono Shrine (Shiga)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:大津市の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おのしんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:重要文化財 (建造物)]] [[Category:大津市の重要文化財]] [[Category:室町時代の建築]] [[Category:小野篁]] [[Category:小野妹子]] [[Category:小野道風]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:qqqqqqq]]

{{wikidata link|Q11464225}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Ono Shrine |画像 = [[Image:Otsu-onojinja.JPG|270px]]
Shrine buildings |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ōtsu|Q202907|WD=Q202907|1=Ōtsu}}Ono 1961 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Ama-tarashihiko-kuni-oshi-hito-no-Mikoto|Q11443593|WD=Q11443593|1=Prince Ametarashihiko}}
{{ill|lt=Tachikara-mochi-tsuki no omi|Q11604425|WD=Q11604425|lt=Kome-mochi-tsuki-ōomi-no-Mikoto|1=Taganetsuki no Ōomi no Mikoto}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=major myōjin shrine|1=Myōjin Taisha}})
former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建 = Founding era unknown |本殿 = {{ill|lt=shinmei-zukuri|Q930545|WD=Q930545|1=Shinmei-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=November 2|Q2996|WD=Q2996|1=November 2}} |神事 = Shitogi Festival |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Ono Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=9|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Ono Shrine''' (おのじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Ono, {{ill|lt=Ōtsu|Q202907|WD=Q202907|1=Ōtsu}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}. Its former rank was {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. The {{ill|lt=enshrined deity|Q11591100|WD=Q11591100|1=Saijin}} is {{ill|lt=Kome-mochi-tsuki-ōomi|Q11604425|WD=Q11604425|lt=Kome-mochi-tsuki-ōomi-no-Mikoto|1=Taganetsuki no Ōomi no Mikoto}}, ancestor of the {{ill|lt=Ono clan|Q11464141|WD=Q11464141|1=Ono clan}}, and is said to be the ancestral deity of mochi making in Japan. For that reason, the annual Shitogi Festival receives worshipers from confectionery industries across Japan. The shrine crest is Mitsume. === History === This area is the base of the {{ill|lt=Ono clan|Q11464141|WD=Q11464141|1=Ono clan}}. The founding period is unknown, but it was designated a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}). In {{ill|lt=1891|Q7837|WD=Q7837|1=1891}} ({{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 24), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Enshrined deities === * Main deities - {{ill|lt=Ama-tarashihiko-kuni-oshi-hito-no-Mikoto|Q11443593|WD=Q11443593|1=Prince Ametarashihiko}}, {{ill|lt=Tachikara-mochi-tsuki no omi|Q11604425|WD=Q11604425|lt=Kome-mochi-tsuki-ōomi-no-Mikoto|1=Taganetsuki no Ōomi no Mikoto}} === Precinct === [[Image:Onotakamurajinja.JPG|thumb|Ono no Takamura Shrine, honden]] [[Image:Onotofujinja.JPG|thumb|Ono no Tōfū Shrine, honden]] * Honden * Chūmon gate * Ono no Takamura Shrine ({{ill|lt=Important Cultural Property|Q1188622|WD=Q1188622|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)}}) - Deity: {{ill|lt=Ono no Takamura|Q1139928|WD=Q1139928|1=Ono no Takamura}}. Built in year 3 of {{ill|lt=Ryakuō|Q1146182|WD=Q1146182|1=Ryakuō}} ({{ill|lt=1340|Q6056|WD=Q6056|1=1340}}). * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Hachiman Shrine|1=Hachiman shrine|WD=Q11390939}} * {{ill|lt=Matsuo Shrine|Q11529677|WD=Q11529677|1=Matsuo shrine}} * Shrine office * Outer precinct shrines ** Ono no Tōfū Shrine (Important Cultural Property) - Deity: {{ill|lt=Ono no Tōfū|Q1439775|WD=Q1439775|1=Ono no Michikaze}}. Built in Ryakuō 4 ({{ill|lt=1341|Q6062|WD=Q6062|1=1341}}). ** Juge Shrine ** {{ill|lt=Yasaka Shrine|Q692714|WD=Q692714|1=Yasaka Shrine}} ** Okamiya Shrine ** Ono no Imoko Shrine - Deity: {{ill|lt=Ono no Imoko|Q1284072|WD=Q1284072|1=Ono no Imoko}}. Built on the mound of Karasu-yama Kofun, said to be Imoko's grave. === Cultural properties === === Important Cultural Properties === * Honden of Ono no Takamura Shrine * Honden of Ono no Tōfū Shrine === Ōtsu City designated tangible cultural property === * One stone hōtō pagoda === Festivals === * November 2 - Shitogi Festival === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=117 Ono Shrine] (Shiga Prefectural Shrine Association) *[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/210201.html Ono Shrine Two Seats] (Kokugakuin University 21st Century COE Program, Shinto/Shrine Historical Materials Compilation) {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ono Shrine (Shiga)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ono Shrine (Shiga)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Ono Shrine (Shiga)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:大津市の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おのしんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:重要文化財 (建造物)]] [[Category:大津市の重要文化財]] [[Category:室町時代の建築]] [[Category:小野篁]] [[Category:小野妹子]] [[Category:小野道風]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:qqqqqqq]]

{{wikidata link|Q11464225}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Ono Shrine |画像 = [[Image:Otsu-onojinja.JPG|270px]]
Shrine buildings |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ōtsu|Q202907|WD=Q202907|1=Ōtsu}}Ono 1961 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Ama-tarashihiko-kuni-oshi-hito-no-Mikoto|Q11443593|WD=Q11443593|1=Prince Ametarashihiko}}
{{ill|lt=Tachikara-mochi-tsuki no omi|Q11604425|WD=Q11604425|lt=Kome-mochi-tsuki-ōomi-no-Mikoto|1=Taganetsuki no Ōomi no Mikoto}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=major myōjin shrine|1=Myōjin Taisha}})
former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建 = Founding era unknown |本殿 = {{ill|lt=shinmei-zukuri|Q930545|WD=Q930545|1=Shinmei-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=November 2|Q2996|WD=Q2996|1=November 2}} |神事 = Shitogi Festival |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Ono Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=9|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Ono Shrine''' (おのじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Ono, {{ill|lt=Ōtsu|Q202907|WD=Q202907|1=Ōtsu}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}. Its former rank was {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. The {{ill|lt=enshrined deity|Q11591100|WD=Q11591100|1=Saijin}} is {{ill|lt=Kome-mochi-tsuki-ōomi|Q11604425|WD=Q11604425|lt=Kome-mochi-tsuki-ōomi-no-Mikoto|1=Taganetsuki no Ōomi no Mikoto}}, ancestor of the {{ill|lt=Ono clan|Q11464141|WD=Q11464141|1=Ono clan}}, and is said to be the ancestral deity of mochi making in Japan. For that reason, the annual Shitogi Festival receives worshipers from confectionery industries across Japan. The shrine crest is Mitsume. === History === This area is the base of the {{ill|lt=Ono clan|Q11464141|WD=Q11464141|1=Ono clan}}. The founding period is unknown, but it was designated a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}). In {{ill|lt=1891|Q7837|WD=Q7837|1=1891}} ({{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 24), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Enshrined deities === * Main deities - {{ill|lt=Ama-tarashihiko-kuni-oshi-hito-no-Mikoto|Q11443593|WD=Q11443593|1=Prince Ametarashihiko}}, {{ill|lt=Tachikara-mochi-tsuki no omi|Q11604425|WD=Q11604425|lt=Kome-mochi-tsuki-ōomi-no-Mikoto|1=Taganetsuki no Ōomi no Mikoto}} === Precinct === [[Image:Onotakamurajinja.JPG|thumb|Ono no Takamura Shrine, honden]] [[Image:Onotofujinja.JPG|thumb|Ono no Tōfū Shrine, honden]] * Honden * Chūmon gate * Ono no Takamura Shrine ({{ill|lt=Important Cultural Property|Q1188622|WD=Q1188622|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)}}) - Deity: {{ill|lt=Ono no Takamura|Q1139928|WD=Q1139928|1=Ono no Takamura}}. Built in year 3 of {{ill|lt=Ryakuō|Q1146182|WD=Q1146182|1=Ryakuō}} ({{ill|lt=1340|Q6056|WD=Q6056|1=1340}}). * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Hachiman Shrine|1=Hachiman shrine|WD=Q11390939}} * {{ill|lt=Matsuo Shrine|Q11529677|WD=Q11529677|1=Matsuo shrine}} * Shrine office * Outer precinct shrines ** Ono no Tōfū Shrine (Important Cultural Property) - Deity: {{ill|lt=Ono no Tōfū|Q1439775|WD=Q1439775|1=Ono no Michikaze}}. Built in Ryakuō 4 ({{ill|lt=1341|Q6062|WD=Q6062|1=1341}}). ** Juge Shrine ** {{ill|lt=Yasaka Shrine|Q692714|WD=Q692714|1=Yasaka Shrine}} ** Okamiya Shrine ** Ono no Imoko Shrine - Deity: {{ill|lt=Ono no Imoko|Q1284072|WD=Q1284072|1=Ono no Imoko}}. Built on the mound of Karasu-yama Kofun, said to be Imoko's grave. === Cultural properties === === Important Cultural Properties === * Honden of Ono no Takamura Shrine * Honden of Ono no Tōfū Shrine === Ōtsu City designated tangible cultural property === * One stone hōtō pagoda === Festivals === * November 2 - Shitogi Festival === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=117 Ono Shrine] (Shiga Prefectural Shrine Association) *[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/210201.html Ono Shrine Two Seats] (Kokugakuin University 21st Century COE Program, Shinto/Shrine Historical Materials Compilation) {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ono Shrine (Shiga)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ono Shrine (Shiga)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Ono Shrine (Shiga)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:大津市の神社]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おのしんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:重要文化財 (建造物)]] [[Category:大津市の重要文化財]] [[Category:室町時代の建築]] [[Category:小野篁]] [[Category:小野妹子]] [[Category:小野道風]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:qqqqqqq]]

former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建 = Founding era unknown |本殿 = {{ill|lt=shinmei-zukuri|Q930545|WD=Q930545|1=Shinmei-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=November 2|Q2996|WD=Q2996|1=November 2}} |神事 = Shitogi Festival |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Ono Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=9|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Ono Shrine''' (おのじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Ono, {{ill|lt=Ōtsu|Q202907|WD=Q202907|1=Ōtsu}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}. Its former rank was {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. The {{ill|lt=enshrined deity|Q11591100|WD=Q11591100|1=Saijin}} is {{ill|lt=Kome-mochi-tsuki-ōomi|Q11604425|WD=Q11604425|lt=Kome-mochi-tsuki-ōomi-no-Mikoto|1=Taganetsuki no Ōomi no Mikoto}}, ancestor of the {{ill|lt=Ono clan|Q11464141|WD=Q11464141|1=Ono clan}}, and is said to be the ancestral deity of mochi making in Japan. For that reason, the annual Shitogi Festival receives worshipers from confectionery industries across Japan. The shrine crest is Mitsume. === History === This area is the base of the {{ill|lt=Ono clan|Q11464141|WD=Q11464141|1=Ono clan}}. The founding period is unknown, but it was designated a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}). In {{ill|lt=1891|Q7837|WD=Q7837|1=1891}} ({{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 24), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Enshrined deities === * Main deities - {{ill|lt=Ama-tarashihiko-kuni-oshi-hito-no-Mikoto|Q11443593|WD=Q11443593|1=Prince Ametarashihiko}}, {{ill|lt=Tachikara-mochi-tsuki no omi|Q11604425|WD=Q11604425|lt=Kome-mochi-tsuki-ōomi-no-Mikoto|1=Taganetsuki no Ōomi no Mikoto}} === Precinct === [[Image:Onotakamurajinja.JPG|thumb|Ono no Takamura Shrine, honden]] [[Image:Onotofujinja.JPG|thumb|Ono no Tōfū Shrine, honden]] * Honden * Chūmon gate * Ono no Takamura Shrine ({{ill|lt=Important Cultural Property|Q1188622|WD=Q1188622|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)}}) - Deity: {{ill|lt=Ono no Takamura|Q1139928|WD=Q1139928|1=Ono no Takamura}}. Built in year 3 of {{ill|lt=Ryakuō|Q1146182|WD=Q1146182|1=Ryakuō}} ({{ill|lt=1340|Q6056|WD=Q6056|1=1340}}). * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Hachiman Shrine|1=Hachiman shrine|WD=Q11390939}} * {{ill|lt=Matsuo Shrine|Q11529677|WD=Q11529677|1=Matsuo shrine}} * Shrine office * Outer precinct shrines ** Ono no Tōfū Shrine (Important Cultural Property) - Deity: {{ill|lt=Ono no Tōfū|Q1439775|WD=Q1439775|1=Ono no Michikaze}}. Built in Ryakuō 4 ({{ill|lt=1341|Q6062|WD=Q6062|1=1341}}). ** Juge Shrine ** {{ill|lt=Yasaka Shrine|Q692714|WD=Q692714|1=Yasaka Shrine}} ** Okamiya Shrine ** Ono no Imoko Shrine - Deity: {{ill|lt=Ono no Imoko|Q1284072|WD=Q1284072|1=Ono no Imoko}}. Built on the mound of Karasu-yama Kofun, said to be Imoko's grave. === Cultural properties === === Important Cultural Properties === * Honden of Ono no Takamura Shrine * Honden of Ono no Tōfū Shrine === Ōtsu City designated tangible cultural property === * One stone hōtō pagoda === Festivals === * November 2 - Shitogi Festival === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=117 Ono Shrine] (Shiga Prefectural Shrine Association) *[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/210201.html Ono Shrine Two Seats] (Kokugakuin University 21st Century COE Program, Shinto/Shrine Historical Materials Compilation) {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ono Shrine (Shiga)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ono Shrine (Shiga)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Ono Shrine (Shiga)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Otsu]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おのしんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:重要文化財 (建造物)]] [[Category:大津市の重要文化財]] [[Category:室町時代の建築]] [[Category:小野篁]] [[Category:小野妹子]] [[Category:小野道風]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:qqqqqqq]]

{{wikidata link|Q11464225}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Ono Shrine |画像 = [[Image:Otsu-onojinja.JPG|270px]]
Shrine buildings |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ōtsu|Q202907|WD=Q202907|1=Ōtsu}}Ono 1961 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Ama-tarashihiko-kuni-oshi-hito-no-Mikoto|Q11443593|WD=Q11443593|1=Prince Ametarashihiko}}
{{ill|lt=Tachikara-mochi-tsuki no omi|Q11604425|WD=Q11604425|lt=Kome-mochi-tsuki-ōomi-no-Mikoto|1=Taganetsuki no Ōomi no Mikoto}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=major myōjin shrine|1=Myōjin Taisha}})
former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建 = Founding era unknown |本殿 = {{ill|lt=shinmei-zukuri|Q930545|WD=Q930545|1=Shinmei-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=November 2|Q2996|WD=Q2996|1=November 2}} |神事 = Shitogi Festival |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Ono Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=9|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Ono Shrine''' (おのじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Ono, {{ill|lt=Ōtsu|Q202907|WD=Q202907|1=Ōtsu}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}. Its former rank was {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. The {{ill|lt=enshrined deity|Q11591100|WD=Q11591100|1=Saijin}} is {{ill|lt=Kome-mochi-tsuki-ōomi|Q11604425|WD=Q11604425|lt=Kome-mochi-tsuki-ōomi-no-Mikoto|1=Taganetsuki no Ōomi no Mikoto}}, ancestor of the {{ill|lt=Ono clan|Q11464141|WD=Q11464141|1=Ono clan}}, and is said to be the ancestral deity of mochi making in Japan. For that reason, the annual Shitogi Festival receives worshipers from confectionery industries across Japan. The shrine crest is Mitsume. === History === This area is the base of the {{ill|lt=Ono clan|Q11464141|WD=Q11464141|1=Ono clan}}. The founding period is unknown, but it was designated a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}). In {{ill|lt=1891|Q7837|WD=Q7837|1=1891}} ({{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 24), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Enshrined deities === * Main deities - {{ill|lt=Ama-tarashihiko-kuni-oshi-hito-no-Mikoto|Q11443593|WD=Q11443593|1=Prince Ametarashihiko}}, {{ill|lt=Tachikara-mochi-tsuki no omi|Q11604425|WD=Q11604425|lt=Kome-mochi-tsuki-ōomi-no-Mikoto|1=Taganetsuki no Ōomi no Mikoto}} === Precinct === [[Image:Onotakamurajinja.JPG|thumb|Ono no Takamura Shrine, honden]] [[Image:Onotofujinja.JPG|thumb|Ono no Tōfū Shrine, honden]] * Honden * Chūmon gate * Ono no Takamura Shrine ({{ill|lt=Important Cultural Property|Q1188622|WD=Q1188622|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)}}) - Deity: {{ill|lt=Ono no Takamura|Q1139928|WD=Q1139928|1=Ono no Takamura}}. Built in year 3 of {{ill|lt=Ryakuō|Q1146182|WD=Q1146182|1=Ryakuō}} ({{ill|lt=1340|Q6056|WD=Q6056|1=1340}}). * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Hachiman Shrine|1=Hachiman shrine|WD=Q11390939}} * {{ill|lt=Matsuo Shrine|Q11529677|WD=Q11529677|1=Matsuo shrine}} * Shrine office * Outer precinct shrines ** Ono no Tōfū Shrine (Important Cultural Property) - Deity: {{ill|lt=Ono no Tōfū|Q1439775|WD=Q1439775|1=Ono no Michikaze}}. Built in Ryakuō 4 ({{ill|lt=1341|Q6062|WD=Q6062|1=1341}}). ** Juge Shrine ** {{ill|lt=Yasaka Shrine|Q692714|WD=Q692714|1=Yasaka Shrine}} ** Okamiya Shrine ** Ono no Imoko Shrine - Deity: {{ill|lt=Ono no Imoko|Q1284072|WD=Q1284072|1=Ono no Imoko}}. Built on the mound of Karasu-yama Kofun, said to be Imoko's grave. === Cultural properties === === Important Cultural Properties === * Honden of Ono no Takamura Shrine * Honden of Ono no Tōfū Shrine === Ōtsu City designated tangible cultural property === * One stone hōtō pagoda === Festivals === * November 2 - Shitogi Festival === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=117 Ono Shrine] (Shiga Prefectural Shrine Association) *[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/210201.html Ono Shrine Two Seats] (Kokugakuin University 21st Century COE Program, Shinto/Shrine Historical Materials Compilation) {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ono Shrine (Shiga)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ono Shrine (Shiga)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Ono Shrine (Shiga)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Otsu]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おのしんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:重要文化財 (建造物)]] [[Category:大津市の重要文化財]] [[Category:Architecture of Muromachi period]] [[Category:小野篁]] [[Category:小野妹子]] [[Category:小野道風]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:qqqqqqq]]

{{wikidata link|Q11464225}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Ono Shrine |画像 = [[Image:Otsu-onojinja.JPG|270px]]
Shrine buildings |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ōtsu|Q202907|WD=Q202907|1=Ōtsu}}Ono 1961 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Ama-tarashihiko-kuni-oshi-hito-no-Mikoto|Q11443593|WD=Q11443593|1=Prince Ametarashihiko}}
{{ill|lt=Tachikara-mochi-tsuki no omi|Q11604425|WD=Q11604425|lt=Kome-mochi-tsuki-ōomi-no-Mikoto|1=Taganetsuki no Ōomi no Mikoto}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=major myōjin shrine|1=Myōjin Taisha}})
former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建 = Founding era unknown |本殿 = {{ill|lt=shinmei-zukuri|Q930545|WD=Q930545|1=Shinmei-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=November 2|Q2996|WD=Q2996|1=November 2}} |神事 = Shitogi Festival |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Ono Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=9|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Ono Shrine''' (おのじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Ono, {{ill|lt=Ōtsu|Q202907|WD=Q202907|1=Ōtsu}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}. Its former rank was {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. The {{ill|lt=enshrined deity|Q11591100|WD=Q11591100|1=Saijin}} is {{ill|lt=Kome-mochi-tsuki-ōomi|Q11604425|WD=Q11604425|lt=Kome-mochi-tsuki-ōomi-no-Mikoto|1=Taganetsuki no Ōomi no Mikoto}}, ancestor of the {{ill|lt=Ono clan|Q11464141|WD=Q11464141|1=Ono clan}}, and is said to be the ancestral deity of mochi making in Japan. For that reason, the annual Shitogi Festival receives worshipers from confectionery industries across Japan. The shrine crest is Mitsume. === History === This area is the base of the {{ill|lt=Ono clan|Q11464141|WD=Q11464141|1=Ono clan}}. The founding period is unknown, but it was designated a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}). In {{ill|lt=1891|Q7837|WD=Q7837|1=1891}} ({{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 24), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Enshrined deities === * Main deities - {{ill|lt=Ama-tarashihiko-kuni-oshi-hito-no-Mikoto|Q11443593|WD=Q11443593|1=Prince Ametarashihiko}}, {{ill|lt=Tachikara-mochi-tsuki no omi|Q11604425|WD=Q11604425|lt=Kome-mochi-tsuki-ōomi-no-Mikoto|1=Taganetsuki no Ōomi no Mikoto}} === Precinct === [[Image:Onotakamurajinja.JPG|thumb|Ono no Takamura Shrine, honden]] [[Image:Onotofujinja.JPG|thumb|Ono no Tōfū Shrine, honden]] * Honden * Chūmon gate * Ono no Takamura Shrine ({{ill|lt=Important Cultural Property|Q1188622|WD=Q1188622|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)}}) - Deity: {{ill|lt=Ono no Takamura|Q1139928|WD=Q1139928|1=Ono no Takamura}}. Built in year 3 of {{ill|lt=Ryakuō|Q1146182|WD=Q1146182|1=Ryakuō}} ({{ill|lt=1340|Q6056|WD=Q6056|1=1340}}). * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Hachiman Shrine|1=Hachiman shrine|WD=Q11390939}} * {{ill|lt=Matsuo Shrine|Q11529677|WD=Q11529677|1=Matsuo shrine}} * Shrine office * Outer precinct shrines ** Ono no Tōfū Shrine (Important Cultural Property) - Deity: {{ill|lt=Ono no Tōfū|Q1439775|WD=Q1439775|1=Ono no Michikaze}}. Built in Ryakuō 4 ({{ill|lt=1341|Q6062|WD=Q6062|1=1341}}). ** Juge Shrine ** {{ill|lt=Yasaka Shrine|Q692714|WD=Q692714|1=Yasaka Shrine}} ** Okamiya Shrine ** Ono no Imoko Shrine - Deity: {{ill|lt=Ono no Imoko|Q1284072|WD=Q1284072|1=Ono no Imoko}}. Built on the mound of Karasu-yama Kofun, said to be Imoko's grave. === Cultural properties === === Important Cultural Properties === * Honden of Ono no Takamura Shrine * Honden of Ono no Tōfū Shrine === Ōtsu City designated tangible cultural property === * One stone hōtō pagoda === Festivals === * November 2 - Shitogi Festival === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=117 Ono Shrine] (Shiga Prefectural Shrine Association) *[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/210201.html Ono Shrine Two Seats] (Kokugakuin University 21st Century COE Program, Shinto/Shrine Historical Materials Compilation) {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ono Shrine (Shiga)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ono Shrine (Shiga)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Ono Shrine (Shiga)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Otsu]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おのしんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:Cultural heritage monuments in Japan]] [[Category:大津市の重要文化財]] [[Category:Architecture of Muromachi period]] [[Category:小野篁]] [[Category:小野妹子]] [[Category:小野道風]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:qqqqqqq]]

Shrine buildings |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ōtsu|Q202907|WD=Q202907|1=Ōtsu}}Ono 1961 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Ama-tarashihiko-kuni-oshi-hito-no-Mikoto|Q11443593|WD=Q11443593|1=Prince Ametarashihiko}}
{{ill|lt=Tachikara-mochi-tsuki no omi|Q11604425|WD=Q11604425|lt=Kome-mochi-tsuki-ōomi-no-Mikoto|1=Taganetsuki no Ōomi no Mikoto}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=major myōjin shrine|1=Myōjin Taisha}})
former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建 = Founding era unknown |本殿 = {{ill|lt=shinmei-zukuri|Q930545|WD=Q930545|1=Shinmei-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=November 2|Q2996|WD=Q2996|1=November 2}} |神事 = Shitogi Festival |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Ono Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=9|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Ono Shrine''' (おのじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Ono, {{ill|lt=Ōtsu|Q202907|WD=Q202907|1=Ōtsu}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}. Its former rank was {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. The {{ill|lt=enshrined deity|Q11591100|WD=Q11591100|1=Saijin}} is {{ill|lt=Kome-mochi-tsuki-ōomi|Q11604425|WD=Q11604425|lt=Kome-mochi-tsuki-ōomi-no-Mikoto|1=Taganetsuki no Ōomi no Mikoto}}, ancestor of the {{ill|lt=Ono clan|Q11464141|WD=Q11464141|1=Ono clan}}, and is said to be the ancestral deity of mochi making in Japan. For that reason, the annual Shitogi Festival receives worshipers from confectionery industries across Japan. The shrine crest is Mitsume. === History === This area is the base of the {{ill|lt=Ono clan|Q11464141|WD=Q11464141|1=Ono clan}}. The founding period is unknown, but it was designated a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}). In {{ill|lt=1891|Q7837|WD=Q7837|1=1891}} ({{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 24), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Enshrined deities === * Main deities - {{ill|lt=Ama-tarashihiko-kuni-oshi-hito-no-Mikoto|Q11443593|WD=Q11443593|1=Prince Ametarashihiko}}, {{ill|lt=Tachikara-mochi-tsuki no omi|Q11604425|WD=Q11604425|lt=Kome-mochi-tsuki-ōomi-no-Mikoto|1=Taganetsuki no Ōomi no Mikoto}} === Precinct === [[Image:Onotakamurajinja.JPG|thumb|Ono no Takamura Shrine, honden]] [[Image:Onotofujinja.JPG|thumb|Ono no Tōfū Shrine, honden]] * Honden * Chūmon gate * Ono no Takamura Shrine ({{ill|lt=Important Cultural Property|Q1188622|WD=Q1188622|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)}}) - Deity: {{ill|lt=Ono no Takamura|Q1139928|WD=Q1139928|1=Ono no Takamura}}. Built in year 3 of {{ill|lt=Ryakuō|Q1146182|WD=Q1146182|1=Ryakuō}} ({{ill|lt=1340|Q6056|WD=Q6056|1=1340}}). * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Hachiman Shrine|1=Hachiman shrine|WD=Q11390939}} * {{ill|lt=Matsuo Shrine|Q11529677|WD=Q11529677|1=Matsuo shrine}} * Shrine office * Outer precinct shrines ** Ono no Tōfū Shrine (Important Cultural Property) - Deity: {{ill|lt=Ono no Tōfū|Q1439775|WD=Q1439775|1=Ono no Michikaze}}. Built in Ryakuō 4 ({{ill|lt=1341|Q6062|WD=Q6062|1=1341}}). ** Juge Shrine ** {{ill|lt=Yasaka Shrine|Q692714|WD=Q692714|1=Yasaka Shrine}} ** Okamiya Shrine ** Ono no Imoko Shrine - Deity: {{ill|lt=Ono no Imoko|Q1284072|WD=Q1284072|1=Ono no Imoko}}. Built on the mound of Karasu-yama Kofun, said to be Imoko's grave. === Cultural properties === === Important Cultural Properties === * Honden of Ono no Takamura Shrine * Honden of Ono no Tōfū Shrine === Ōtsu City designated tangible cultural property === * One stone hōtō pagoda === Festivals === * November 2 - Shitogi Festival === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=117 Ono Shrine] (Shiga Prefectural Shrine Association) *[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/210201.html Ono Shrine Two Seats] (Kokugakuin University 21st Century COE Program, Shinto/Shrine Historical Materials Compilation) {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ono Shrine (Shiga)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ono Shrine (Shiga)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Ono Shrine (Shiga)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Otsu]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おのしんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:Cultural heritage monuments in Japan]] [[Category:大津市の重要文化財]] [[Category:Architecture of Muromachi period]] [[Category:小野篁]] [[Category:小野妹子]] [[Category:小野道風]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]]

Shrine buildings |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ōtsu|Q202907|WD=Q202907|1=Ōtsu}}Ono 1961 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Ama-tarashihiko-kuni-oshi-hito-no-Mikoto|Q11443593|WD=Q11443593|1=Prince Ametarashihiko}}
{{ill|lt=Tachikara-mochi-tsuki no omi|Q11604425|WD=Q11604425|lt=Kome-mochi-tsuki-ōomi-no-Mikoto|1=Taganetsuki no Ōomi no Mikoto}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=major myōjin shrine|1=Myōjin Taisha}})
former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建 = Founding era unknown |本殿 = {{ill|lt=shinmei-zukuri|Q930545|WD=Q930545|1=Shinmei-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=November 2|Q2996|WD=Q2996|1=November 2}} |神事 = Shitogi Festival |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Ono Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=9|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Ono Shrine''' (おのじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Ono, {{ill|lt=Ōtsu|Q202907|WD=Q202907|1=Ōtsu}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}. Its former rank was {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. The {{ill|lt=enshrined deity|Q11591100|WD=Q11591100|1=Saijin}} is {{ill|lt=Kome-mochi-tsuki-ōomi|Q11604425|WD=Q11604425|lt=Kome-mochi-tsuki-ōomi-no-Mikoto|1=Taganetsuki no Ōomi no Mikoto}}, ancestor of the {{ill|lt=Ono clan|Q11464141|WD=Q11464141|1=Ono clan}}, and is said to be the ancestral deity of mochi making in Japan. For that reason, the annual Shitogi Festival receives worshipers from confectionery industries across Japan. The shrine crest is Mitsume. === History === This area is the base of the {{ill|lt=Ono clan|Q11464141|WD=Q11464141|1=Ono clan}}. The founding period is unknown, but it was designated a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}). In {{ill|lt=1891|Q7837|WD=Q7837|1=1891}} ({{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 24), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Enshrined deities === * Main deities - {{ill|lt=Ama-tarashihiko-kuni-oshi-hito-no-Mikoto|Q11443593|WD=Q11443593|1=Prince Ametarashihiko}}, {{ill|lt=Tachikara-mochi-tsuki no omi|Q11604425|WD=Q11604425|lt=Kome-mochi-tsuki-ōomi-no-Mikoto|1=Taganetsuki no Ōomi no Mikoto}} === Precinct === [[Image:Onotakamurajinja.JPG|thumb|Ono no Takamura Shrine, honden]] [[Image:Onotofujinja.JPG|thumb|Ono no Tōfū Shrine, honden]] * Honden * Chūmon gate * Ono no Takamura Shrine ({{ill|lt=Important Cultural Property|Q1188622|WD=Q1188622|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)}}) - Deity: {{ill|lt=Ono no Takamura|Q1139928|WD=Q1139928|1=Ono no Takamura}}. Built in year 3 of {{ill|lt=Ryakuō|Q1146182|WD=Q1146182|1=Ryakuō}} ({{ill|lt=1340|Q6056|WD=Q6056|1=1340}}). * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Hachiman Shrine|1=Hachiman shrine|WD=Q11390939}} * {{ill|lt=Matsuo Shrine|Q11529677|WD=Q11529677|1=Matsuo shrine}} * Shrine office * Outer precinct shrines ** Ono no Tōfū Shrine (Important Cultural Property) - Deity: {{ill|lt=Ono no Tōfū|Q1439775|WD=Q1439775|1=Ono no Michikaze}}. Built in Ryakuō 4 ({{ill|lt=1341|Q6062|WD=Q6062|1=1341}}). ** Juge Shrine ** {{ill|lt=Yasaka Shrine|Q692714|WD=Q692714|1=Yasaka Shrine}} ** Okamiya Shrine ** Ono no Imoko Shrine - Deity: {{ill|lt=Ono no Imoko|Q1284072|WD=Q1284072|1=Ono no Imoko}}. Built on the mound of Karasu-yama Kofun, said to be Imoko's grave. === Cultural properties === === Important Cultural Properties === * Honden of Ono no Takamura Shrine * Honden of Ono no Tōfū Shrine === Ōtsu City designated tangible cultural property === * One stone hōtō pagoda === Festivals === * November 2 - Shitogi Festival === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=117 Ono Shrine] (Shiga Prefectural Shrine Association) *[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/210201.html Ono Shrine Two Seats] (Kokugakuin University 21st Century COE Program, Shinto/Shrine Historical Materials Compilation) {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ono Shrine (Shiga)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ono Shrine (Shiga)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Ono Shrine (Shiga)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Otsu]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おのしんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:Cultural heritage monuments in Japan]] [[Category:大津市の重要文化財]] [[Category:Architecture of Muromachi period]] [[Category:小野篁]] [[Category:小野妹子]] [[Category:小野道風]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]]

Shrine buildings |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ōtsu|Q202907|WD=Q202907|1=Ōtsu}}Ono 1961 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Ama-tarashihiko-kuni-oshi-hito-no-Mikoto|Q11443593|WD=Q11443593|1=Prince Ametarashihiko}}
{{ill|lt=Tachikara-mochi-tsuki no omi|Q11604425|WD=Q11604425|lt=Kome-mochi-tsuki-ōomi-no-Mikoto|1=Taganetsuki no Ōomi no Mikoto}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=major myōjin shrine|1=Myōjin Taisha}})
former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建 = Founding era unknown |本殿 = {{ill|lt=shinmei-zukuri|Q930545|WD=Q930545|1=Shinmei-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=November 2|Q2996|WD=Q2996|1=November 2}} |神事 = Shitogi Festival |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Ono Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=9|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Ono Shrine''' (おのじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Ono, {{ill|lt=Ōtsu|Q202907|WD=Q202907|1=Ōtsu}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}. Its former rank was {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. The {{ill|lt=enshrined deity|Q11591100|WD=Q11591100|1=Saijin}} is {{ill|lt=Kome-mochi-tsuki-ōomi|Q11604425|WD=Q11604425|lt=Kome-mochi-tsuki-ōomi-no-Mikoto|1=Taganetsuki no Ōomi no Mikoto}}, ancestor of the {{ill|lt=Ono clan|Q11464141|WD=Q11464141|1=Ono clan}}, and is said to be the ancestral deity of mochi making in Japan. For that reason, the annual Shitogi Festival receives worshipers from confectionery industries across Japan. The shrine crest is Mitsume. === History === This area is the base of the {{ill|lt=Ono clan|Q11464141|WD=Q11464141|1=Ono clan}}. The founding period is unknown, but it was designated a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}). In {{ill|lt=1891|Q7837|WD=Q7837|1=1891}} ({{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 24), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Enshrined deities === * Main deities - {{ill|lt=Ama-tarashihiko-kuni-oshi-hito-no-Mikoto|Q11443593|WD=Q11443593|1=Prince Ametarashihiko}}, {{ill|lt=Tachikara-mochi-tsuki no omi|Q11604425|WD=Q11604425|lt=Kome-mochi-tsuki-ōomi-no-Mikoto|1=Taganetsuki no Ōomi no Mikoto}} === Precinct === [[Image:Onotakamurajinja.JPG|thumb|Ono no Takamura Shrine, honden]] [[Image:Onotofujinja.JPG|thumb|Ono no Tōfū Shrine, honden]] * Honden * Chūmon gate * Ono no Takamura Shrine ({{ill|lt=Important Cultural Property|Q1188622|WD=Q1188622|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)}}) - Deity: {{ill|lt=Ono no Takamura|Q1139928|WD=Q1139928|1=Ono no Takamura}}. Built in year 3 of {{ill|lt=Ryakuō|Q1146182|WD=Q1146182|1=Ryakuō}} ({{ill|lt=1340|Q6056|WD=Q6056|1=1340}}). * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Hachiman Shrine|1=Hachiman shrine|WD=Q11390939}} * {{ill|lt=Matsuo Shrine|Q11529677|WD=Q11529677|1=Matsuo shrine}} * Shrine office * Outer precinct shrines ** Ono no Tōfū Shrine (Important Cultural Property) - Deity: {{ill|lt=Ono no Tōfū|Q1439775|WD=Q1439775|1=Ono no Michikaze}}. Built in Ryakuō 4 ({{ill|lt=1341|Q6062|WD=Q6062|1=1341}}). ** Juge Shrine ** {{ill|lt=Yasaka Shrine|Q692714|WD=Q692714|1=Yasaka Shrine}} ** Okamiya Shrine ** Ono no Imoko Shrine - Deity: {{ill|lt=Ono no Imoko|Q1284072|WD=Q1284072|1=Ono no Imoko}}. Built on the mound of Karasu-yama Kofun, said to be Imoko's grave. === Cultural properties === === Important Cultural Properties === * Honden of Ono no Takamura Shrine * Honden of Ono no Tōfū Shrine === Ōtsu City designated tangible cultural property === * One stone hōtō pagoda === Festivals === * November 2 - Shitogi Festival === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=117 Ono Shrine] (Shiga Prefectural Shrine Association) *[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/210201.html Ono Shrine Two Seats] (Kokugakuin University 21st Century COE Program, Shinto/Shrine Historical Materials Compilation) {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ono Shrine (Shiga)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ono Shrine (Shiga)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Ono Shrine (Shiga)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Otsu]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おのしんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:Cultural heritage monuments in Japan]] [[Category:大津市の重要文化財]] [[Category:Architecture of Muromachi period]] [[Category:小野篁]] [[Category:小野妹子]] [[Category:小野道風]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]]
